memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_SensorFusion *f, q16_t Kp, q16_t Ki, q16_t dt)
memberdef.name: syn_sensor_fusion_init

briefdescription.para: Initialize the IMU sensor fusion filter.

parameterdescription.para: Sampling interval in seconds (e.g., Q16_FROM_FLOAT(0.01) for 100 Hz).

briefdescription.para: Reset filter state to initial identity orientation (q = [1, 0, 0, 0]).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_SensorFusion *f, q16_t gx, q16_t gy, q16_t gz, q16_t ax, q16_t ay, q16_t az)
memberdef.name: syn_sensor_fusion_update

briefdescription.para: Update orientation estimate using 6-axis IMU sample.

parameterdescription.para: Accelerometer X acceleration in g or m/s² (Q16.16).
Accelerometer Y acceleration in g or m/s² (Q16.16).
Accelerometer Z acceleration in g or m/s² (Q16.16).

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM if NULL.
SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM if NULL.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve current Euler attitude angles (Roll, Pitch, Yaw).

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_INVALID_PARAM if NULL.

briefdescription.para: 6-DOF IMU Mahony Sensor Fusion & AHRS Filter implementation.
